first_paragraph: The **[2006 Winter Olympic Games](/wiki/2006_Winter_Olympics "2006 Winter Olympics") [Snowboarding](/wiki/Snowboarding "Snowboarding")** competition consisted of men's and women's [halfpipe](/wiki/Halfpipe "Halfpipe"), [parallel giant slalom](/wiki/Parallel_giant_slalom "Parallel giant slalom") and [snowboard cross](/wiki/Snowboard_cross "Snowboard cross") events.[[1]](#cite_note-SR-1)

The **[2006 Winter Olympic Games](/wiki/2006_Winter_Olympics "2006 Winter Olympics") [Snowboarding](/wiki/Snowboarding "Snowboarding")** competition consisted of men's and women's [halfpipe](/wiki/Halfpipe "Halfpipe"), [parallel giant slalom](/wiki/Parallel_giant_slalom "Parallel giant slalom") and [snowboard cross](/wiki/Snowboard_cross "Snowboard cross") events.[[1]](#cite_note-SR-1)
